executionArgs.additionalInstruction: PROMPT-3 uygula: Regkasse multi-tenant isolation testleri olustur ve calistir. Kurallar: Tenant A Tenant B verisini gorememeli; cross-tenant resource access 404 olmali (403 degil); ozellikle /api/admin/payments ve /api/admin/users endpointlerinde tenant context zorunlu dogrulansin. Oncelik P0 security. Auth icin seeded admin kullan: loginIdentifier=admin@admin.com, password=Admin123!, clientApp=admin. Test data olustururken iki farkli tenant kullan ve tenantlar arasi erisimi dene.
